title: datattributes
description: Adds "fake" attributes with a datapack, Great for RPG's,   Read description
body:
# **Datattributes**
This datapack adds several attributes to minecraft, but not via normal ways, but with scoreboards. (because it's a datapack) 

## **How to use it?**
When you want to change one of the attributes, you do `/scoreboard players set @s a__<attribute> <number>`
_Some attributes are: scoreboard score divided by 100 to make sure you can do +5%, or +55%_

### **Questions?**
For questions, join the discord server
## **Added attributes:**

<details>
<summary>Read This First: Example</summary>

- description  
- scoreboard name  
- what +1 score/"attribute" does  
- Min value - max value | step amount (if it's 1 all numbers are ok, if it's 5 only 5, 10, 15 etc work. [that's for percentages])

</details>

<details>
<summary>Sword Damage</summary>

- Increases damage done with swords  
- `a__sword_damage`  
- +1 damage  
- 1 - 30 | 1

</details>

<details>
<summary>Axe Damage</summary>

- Increases damage done with axes  
- `a__axe_damage`  
- +1 damage  
- 1 - 30 | 1

</details>

<details>
<summary>Crit Chance</summary>

- Increases chance to get a crit  
- `a__crit_chance`  
- +1% chance  
- 5 - 500 | 5 (only percentages divisible by 5 work)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Crit Damage Add</summary>

- Increases damage you get with a crit (not minecraft crit but crit chance)  
- `a__crit_damage_add`  
- +0.05 damage  
- 50 - 2000 | 50 (50 = +0.5, 100 = +1 etc)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Crit Damage Multiply</summary>

- Increases crit damage (same as previous but this one multiplies)  
- `a__crit_damage_multiply`  
- +1% damage  
- 5 - 200 | 5

</details>

<details>
<summary>Min XP</summary>

- Sets a minimum xp level  
- `a__min_xp`  
- +1 minimum xp lvl  
- 1 - 30 | 1

</details>

<details>
<summary>Max XP</summary>

- Sets a maximum xp level  
- `a__max_xp`  
- +1 maximum xp lvl  
- 1 - 30 | 1

</details>

<details>
<summary>Berserk Damage</summary>

- Gives damage boost if you are under 10 hp (5 hearts)  
- `a__berserk_damage`  
- +1% extra damage  
- 5 - 200 | 5

</details>

<details>
<summary>Berserk Speed</summary>

- Gives speed boost if you are under 10 hp (5 hearts)  
- `a__berserk_speed`  
- +1% extra speed  
- 5 - 200 | 5

</details>

<details>
<summary>Berserk Attack Speed</summary>

- Gives attack speed boost if you are under 10 hp (5 hearts)  
- `a__berserk_attack_speed`  
- +1% extra attack speed  
- 5 - 200 | 5

</details>

<details>
<summary>Anchor</summary>

- Gives knockback resistance boost if you are standing still  
- `a__anchor`  
- +10% extra knockback resistance  
- 1 - 10 | 1

</details>

<details>
<summary>Day Resistance</summary>

- Gives extra armor points when it's day  
- `a__day_resistance`  
- +1 extra armor point  
- 1 - 30 | 1

</details>

<details>
<summary>Night Resistance</summary>

- Gives extra armor points when it's night  
- `a__night_resistance`  
- +1 extra armor point  
- 1 - 30 | 1

</details>

<details>
<summary>Day Damage</summary>

- Gives extra damage when it's day  
- `a__day_damage`  
- +1 extra damage point  
- 1 - 30 | 1

</details>

<details>
<summary>Night Damage</summary>

- Gives extra damage when it's night  
- `a__night_damage`  
- +1 extra damage point  
- 1 - 30 | 1

</details>
